# Zyvotrix

> Zyvotrix is a practical edtech platform for industry-ready tech skills. Certification programs include AI-Powered DevOps Engineer (DOP, 4 months), Agentic AI Certification Training (AAC, 3 months), AWS Solutions Architect Program (AWS, 3 months), and Data Science with Python Certification Program (2 months) — with structured roadmaps, hands-on projects, and career-focused learning.

## Official Site

- Homepage: https://www.zyvotrix.com/
- Programs: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses
- FAQ: https://www.zyvotrix.com/faq
- Free Resources: https://www.zyvotrix.com/resources
- About: https://www.zyvotrix.com/about
- Contact: https://www.zyvotrix.com/contact
- Enroll: https://www.zyvotrix.com/enroll

## Programs

- AI-Powered DevOps Engineer Program (DOP): https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/devops-engineer-program
- Agentic AI Certification Training (AAC): https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/aac
- AWS Solutions Architect Program (AWS): https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/aws
- Data Science with Python Certification Program: https://www.zyvotrix.com/courses/data-science

## Who Zyvotrix Is For

Students, fresh graduates, working professionals, freelancers, and career switchers who want practical tech skills — not theory-only learning.

## Learning Approach

- Structured week-by-week roadmaps
- Hands-on labs and capstone projects
- Modern industry tools (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Python, Git, CI/CD, LLMs, data analytics)
- Portfolio-building focus for job readiness
- Community support and mentor guidance

## Frequently Asked Questions

Full FAQ page: https://www.zyvotrix.com/faq

Common questions:
- What is Zyvotrix? A practical edtech platform for DevOps, Agentic AI, AWS, and Data Science certifications.
- Are programs beginner friendly? Data Science and AWS welcome beginners; DOP and AAC benefit from basic programming.
- Are projects included? Yes — every program includes hands-on projects for your portfolio.
- How to enroll? Visit https://www.zyvotrix.com/enroll or https://www.zyvotrix.com/contact
- Free resources? Yes — https://www.zyvotrix.com/resources
